creator: waldeck@gmx.de
text:
I noticed last week problems with http://www.freebsd.org/send-pr.html.

For some days was PR 105640 the latest visible problem request.

I opened monday (2006-11-20) and tuesday (2006-11-20) last week some PRs.
I always got the message that I would receive feedback in one day.
But nothing happened and I cannot find the PRs if I query my name.

I resubmitted the same PRs last monday (2006-11-27).
It was 2 days ago but the PRs are lost again?
